detectors.title: IDOR / BOLA
trigger_conditions: semantic graph or evidence contains one or more normalized signals: authorization object id tenant owner boundary
scope guard must pass before detector emits reportable finding

dataflow: call_chain when resolver can establish it; otherwise candidate only
runtime: HAR/request/response/trace/screenshot/DOM snapshot/role-tenant replay when promotion is attempted

false_positive_downgrade_rules: front-end-only visibility is not impact
blocked backend response downgrades candidate to false_positive or needs_review
secrets are redacted before reporting; unredacted secret is quality-gate FAIL
documentation claims without file/line/request/response evidence are ignored
detectors.promotion_rule: candidate may become confirmed only when evidence manifest is ready, scope is authorized, request/response proves backend behavior, and detector-specific dynamic evidence is present; role/tenant issues additionally require multi-role or cross-tenant replay.

detectors.title: source map 还原敏感逻辑
trigger_conditions: semantic graph or evidence contains one or more normalized signals: sourcesContent role permission secret route
scope guard must pass before detector emits reportable finding

dataflow: call_chain when resolver can establish it; otherwise candidate only
runtime: HAR/request/response/trace/screenshot/DOM snapshot/role-tenant replay when promotion is attempted

false_positive_downgrade_rules: front-end-only visibility is not impact
blocked backend response downgrades candidate to false_positive or needs_review
secrets are redacted before reporting; unredacted secret is quality-gate FAIL
documentation claims without file/line/request/response evidence are ignored
detectors.promotion_rule: candidate may become confirmed only when evidence manifest is ready, scope is authorized, request/response proves backend behavior, and detector-specific dynamic evidence is present; role/tenant issues additionally require multi-role or cross-tenant replay.
